summary: Frontend-only testing of consolidated Services page (/services) — all required sections, data-testids, navigation, language toggle, header/footer behavior verified PASSING in both GR and EN.
critical_code_review_comments: Services.jsx is well-structured (~297 lines) and uses servicesPage translation namespace cleanly.
Pillar cards correctly limit to first 3 benefits via .slice(0,3) — consistent across i18n.

Tech stack list is hardcoded (16 items doubled = 32 marquee entries) — consider moving to data file or translations if multilingual labels are ever needed (currently brand names are language-agnostic, so OK).
/services/:slug route was correctly removed — old slugs gracefully fall back to NotFound (404) page, which matches the spec ('graceful fallback acceptable').
Header NavItem for /services renders a single <a> tag (no dropdown panel on hover) — confirmed via DOM and data-testid='nav-services'.
Footer service section renders 6 names (each (s[lang]||s.el).name) but all hrefs point to '/services' — verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Services page (/services) consolidation verified. All required data-testids present and visible: page-services, services-hero-primary→/contact, services-hero-secondary→/pricing, services-stat-0..3, what-we-do, what-we-offer (6 pillars: pillar-web-design/maintenance/hosting/domain/security/support each with 3 benefits), how-it-works (how-step-0..3 showing 01-04), why-managed (why-item-0..4), services-tech-stack (32 marquee items), services-final-cta with services-cta-primary→/contact and services-cta-secondary→/pricing. GR↔EN toggle correctly switches hero title, pillar names, step text. Header has direct nav-services link (no dropdown on hover, dropdown count=0). Footer service links all point to /services. Old /services/web-design slug renders NotFound (acceptable graceful fallback). Recommend setting localStorage('itg_cookie_consent','accepted') before navigating to avoid cookie banner overlap.
